summary: Boundary-chain performance baseline for the exact clawsembly-hello-agent 0.2.0 artifact on 2.12.1 (cold×3, persistentReuse×3, warm×3 sampled boots; medians over provider boot, staging, readiness, first round trip, and cooperative close) in Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/149.0.7827.55 Safari/537.36 on win32 10.0.26200. Reference-binding numbers only; no upstream agent performance is claimed.
